_comment: Phase 4.5 KPI-gates held-out partition (E3.C SEALED). rng_seed=PRE_REGISTERED_SEED_45=0x4_05_C3=263619. partition_size=20 (20% of K=100). partition_hash = sha256(sorted(heldout-run_ids).join('\n')). Held-out run_ids drawn from the runner's gate-calibration prefix 'phase45-calib-{i}-{hex}'. Sealed against the K=100 calibration committed in gate-calibration-K100.json (commit 76cfc636).
